name: com.rewuio.spreadasset
description: Spreadsheet-style authoring tools for Unity ScriptableObject data. Create paired .spreadasset source documents and linked runtime .asset files, edit array data as sheets with formulas, round-trip selected sheets through CSV import/export, and generate key-based row lookup helpers for runtime assets.

samples.description: Basic SpreadAsset documents, generated ScriptableObject assets, and setup notes.
